title: Meeting Yaiba
overview: Yaiba Kurogane is determined to become a true samurai, but things take an odd turn in the jungle.

title: Fujinken Reborn
overview: Yaiba has come up with a plan and is willing to do nearly anything to provoke Onimaru to a duel.

title: Another Maken
overview: Onimaru now wants to fight Yaiba, but something's off, not least the horns sprouting from his head.

title: Attack of the Eight Ogres
overview: Yaiba has the Raijinken but it's the Thunder God that turns the tables on him. Then there's Onimaru.

title: Onsen Fun
overview: Yaiba et al. head to Ganryu Island to learn about an arcane maken but end up at a shady hot spring.

title: The Unexpected Mr. Bat
overview: Yaiba and crew are back on track but stop in Nagoya where there's more in store than great food.

title: Kojiro Resurrected
overview: Yaiba and his companions finally reach Ganryujima, where they encounter Mr. Spider — and a resurrected, but somewhat peeved, Sasaki Kojiro.

title: The Duel at Ganryu Island
overview: Musashi and Kojiro's duel must proceed as recorded so Yaiba can return to his original time, but Yaiba's careless comment threatens to change history.

title: Dawn of the Lightning Slash
overview: Needing to develop a new sword technique that can counter Onimaru, Yaiba undergoes further grueling training with Musashi — and a scheming Kojiro.

title: Onimaru's Devil Kings
overview: Yaiba and his companions storm Onimaru Castle, but they fall through a trap into the depths of the stronghold and face Onimaru's new henchmen.

title: Raijinken vs. Fujinken
overview: While Yaiba rides high, Onimaru tempts the young hero. And in pure Yaiba fashion, eyebrows rise.

title: Nadeshiko Yamoto Is Calling
overview: A showdown's heating up between Yaiba and Onimaru, but the neighborhood rumor mill is even hotter.

title: Find the Dragon God Orb
overview: Yaiba and team learn of an orb that promises gravity-defying powers. But an undead assassin awaits...

title: The Rise of Ninja Kotaro!
overview: Lake Biwa's orb surprises, but it's Shikoku's Mt. Tsurugi that hides a shadowy and dangerous threat.

title: Showdown! Magician vs. Yaiba
overview: Team Yaiba may have secured the Gold Orb on Shikoku, but it's on to Kyushu, and on Yaiba's back.

title: A Battle of Giants
overview: Troupe Yaiba traipses to Nara for a pivotal tip-off, but it's an odd traveling warrior who shows up.

title: The Man of Yagyu Shinkage-ryu
overview: Yaiba battles Goemon using the Orb of Giants only to lose two of the spheres to the villain's guile.

title: Crisis on Kawanaka-Jima
overview: Jubei's giving Yaiba and team a fighting chance, but that's before they meet the ninja army

title: Darkness Orb Escape Training
overview: Team Yaiba unmasks the true nature of the mysterious orb seized from Goemon, and it’s unlike anything the travelers have encountered before. This time, aspirations are a liability. Is this new realm a dream come true? Or is it a nightmare about to unfurl?

title: The Ruse of Basho the Monkey
overview: The team is eager to grab the illusive final prize, but a decrepit temple and old man stand defiant.

title: Mystery Atop Mt. Fuji
overview: An off-the-wall sphere guides Yaiba to Mt. Fuji to find the elusive and perilous Dragon God Orb.

title: Crossroads of the Soul
overview: Yaiba arrives at the crater of Mt. Fuji only to be faced with a dilemma he could've never imagined.

title: The Dragon God Orb Resurrected!
overview: At the trial to end all trials, the Dragon God desires decisiveness through an impossible choice.

title: The Lunar Invaders
overview: With the ultimate orb and new maken, Yaiba is victorious. But a new battle unfolds over the Pacific.
